case_title: POTRERO HILL IMAGING, LLC. VS. MICHAEL FOX

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-07-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT MYLES; CLERK J. KONG, NOT REPORTED, D525.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT FOX, MICHAEL TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT POTRERO HILL IMAGING, LLC. JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF MICHAEL FOX AND AGAINST PORTRERO HILL IMAGING, LLC. RESPONDENT DID NOT MEET ITS BURDEN OF PROVING APPELLANT CAUSED THE CLAIMED DAMAGE. RESPONDENT WAIVED ITS CLAIM FOR RENT IN THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-02-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-02-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH JAMES TASKETT (TITLE: BUSINESS PARTNER). THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POTRERO HILL IMAGING, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOX, MICHAEL $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,690.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT FOX, MICHAEL MAILED TO RESPONDENT POTRERO HILL IMAGING, LLC.
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,650.00 FILED BY POTRERO HILL IMAGING, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT FOX, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JAN-15-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FOX, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2015 - JUDGMENT REVERSED. APPELLANT DOES NOT OWE RESPONDENT ANY MONEY. THE APPEAL JUDGMENT REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF MAR.-2-2015. JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT MYLES, CLERK J. KONG, NOT REPORTED, D525.
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS TRANSFER TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2015 - JUDGMENT.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-08-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, May 7, 2015 in Department 525:
Potrero Hill Imaging, Llc, Respondent/Plaintiff appears by James Taskett - Business partner.
Roert Devries, Esq, appears for Appellant/Defendant Michael Fox who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. James Taskett testifies on behalf of his company Potrero Hill Imaging, Llc. and also responds to questions from Judge Pro Tem Myles. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
EXHR (A) - 4 pages of photos
EXHR (B) - buliding inspection report
EXHR (C)- stop payment of check
EXHR (D)- 6/3 copy of check

Robert Devries testifies on behalf of Michael Fox and responds to questions from Judge Pro Tem Myles. Counsel Devries examines Michael Fox. The following documentary evidence are introduced:
EXHR 1 - billpay memo from Bank of America
EXHR 2 - settlement agreement

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence of respondent/plaintiff retained by the Court. Court orders dispose of defendant's exhibits per defendent's counsel Robert Devries's request.

Judge Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-03-2015 Judgment Entered
